---
title: Render CV
format: html
---

Run this chunk to re-render the CV and copy the PDF into `docs/` so the website picks it up.

```{r}
setwd("/Users/sunwookwak/Documents/Website/website/_source")
system2("quarto", c("render", "cv_source.qmd"))
file.copy("cv_source.pdf", "../docs/cv_source.pdf", overwrite = TRUE)
```
